📄 Job Description...
full_text:
Job Title: Software Engineer (Backend)

Company: Infosys
Location: Bangalore, India
Salary: ₹6–10 LPA

📄 Job Description:

We are looking for a Backend Developer to design and develop scalable web applications. You will work with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software solutions.

🎯 Requirements:
B.Tech / B.E in Computer Science or related field
Experience in Python / Java
Knowledge of REST APIs and databases
💼 Benefits:
Health insurance
Paid leave
Career growth opportunities
📩 Apply:

Apply through official careers page: https://www.infosys.com/careers
label: Fraudulent
